Query.Sql: CREATE TABLE `accounts_register` ( `id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `account` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `first_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `last_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `address` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `dob` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `account_type` enum ('MSISDN', 'EMAIL') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'MSISDN', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), UNIQUE KEY `unique_account_name` (`account`,`account_type`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB;
